meaning: n.生牛皮,<美>生牛皮鞭vt.用生牛皮鞭抽打adj.生牛皮的
examples: At his belt he carried a rawhide whip.
The Tanning Rack is used to turn Rawhide into Leather.
I also bound that ear limb connection with rawhide strips.
The dogs prance around in Santa outfits from Petco, dine on doggy cakes from Three Dog Bakery, and gnaw on rawhide bones tucked into their stockings.
And Mikey just wants a rawhide.
